special_mechanics.name: Automatic Movement
special_mechanics.description: Kid Klown automatically moves down a path; player controls navigation around obstacles

special_mechanics.name: Collision Deceleration
special_mechanics.description: Various obstacles cause Kid Klown to slow down on collision

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative data only. Available sources contain only gameplay description and level design information. No precise physics parameters, movement values, gravity constants, or jump mechanics are documented. Game uses automatic horizontal movement with collision-based deceleration. Movement parameters would require ROM disassembly to extract.
sources_used: tcrf.net - Kid Klown in Crazy Chase
wikipedia.org - Kid Klown in Crazy Chase
